Operation 'queryExternalGames' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too brief and lacks critical details. Added information about supported platforms, input format (Apicalypse query language), expected output structure, and use cases to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation. Enhanced summary to be more specific about the operation's purpose.

data.current_description: Query external game references (Steam, GOG, etc.).
data.description_suggestion: Query external game references across multiple platforms (Steam, GOG, Epic Games Store, etc.). Accepts Apicalypse query language in the request body to filter, sort, and select specific fields. Returns an array of external game objects containing platform identifiers and game metadata. Use this operation to find games on specific digital distribution platforms or to cross-reference IGDB games with external platform IDs.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks critical details. Added information about supported platforms, input format (Apicalypse query language), expected output structure, and use cases to help AI agents understand when and how to use this operation. Enhanced summary to be more specific about the operation's purpose.

message: Operation 'multiQuery' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description lack specificity and actionability. Added details about input structure (array of query objects), supported resources, output format (ordered result sets), and practical use cases. This helps AI agents understand the operation's efficiency benefits and when to use it instead of individual queries.

data.current_description: Execute multiple queries in a single request using the multi-query endpoint.
data.summary_suggestion: Execute multiple queries in single request
data.description_suggestion: Execute multiple independent queries across different IGDB resources in a single HTTP request. Send an array of query objects in the request body, each containing an Apicalypse query for a specific resource (games, platforms, characters, etc.). Returns an array of result sets corresponding to each query in the same order. This operation is useful for reducing network overhead when retrieving data from multiple resources simultaneously.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description lack specificity and actionability. Added details about input structure (array of query objects), supported resources, output format (ordered result sets), and practical use cases. This helps AI agents understand the operation's efficiency benefits and when to use it instead of individual queries.

message: Operation 'search' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too generic and doesn't explain input format, output structure, or use cases. Added specificity about which resources are searchable, clarified that results are unified with resource type tags, and provided context about when to use this operation versus resource-specific queries. This improves AI agent interpretability significantly.

data.summary_suggestion: Search for games and related content
data.description_suggestion: Perform a full-text search across multiple IGDB resources including games, platforms, characters, companies, genres, and franchises.
